import Link from 'next/link' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card' import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge' import { ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Beaker, FlaskConical, Sparkles, Shield, Clock, Award } from 'lucide-react' export default function Home() { return (
{/* Header */}
PeptideLab
Services Specifications Modifications About
{/* Hero Section */}
30+ Years of Excellence in Peptide Synthesis

Custom Peptide Synthesis Excellence

Optimize your research with expert peptide synthesis services. From simple unmodified to highly modified and hydrophobic peptides, we deliver precision at scale.

{/* Stats Section */}
30+
Years Experience
60
Max Amino Acids
98%
Purity Available
3-5
Week Turnaround
{/* Specifications Section */}
Technical Details

Custom Peptide Specifications

Industry-leading capabilities with rigorous quality control standards

General Specifications
Length
Up to 60 amino acids
Purity
70%, 85%, 90%, 95% (98% for GMP)
Quantity
1 mg to hundreds of grams
Counter-Ion
TFA (default), Acetate, Chloride, Ammonium
 Quality Control Testing
Mass Spec Analysis
Complete identity verification
HPLC Analysis
Purity determination
Additional Testing Available
CHN, Solubility, Endotoxin, Bioburden
{/* Modifications Section */}
Expertise

Peptide Modification Experts

We incorporate single or multiple modifications at N-terminus, C-terminus, or internally to meet your research needs

Fluorescent Dye Labeled Premium fluorescent dyes spanning visible and near-infrared spectrum FRET Peptides Full range of dye-quencher FRET pairs for your applications TR-FRET Peptides Lanthanide metal-labeled peptides for time-resolved applications Stapled Peptides Adaptable platform for versatile biological applications Cyclic Peptides Lactam ring and disulfide-bridged peptide synthesis Glycosylated Peptides Sugar moieties at single or multiple locations Lipopeptides Novel methods for hydrophobic peptide modifications Phosphorylated Peptides Single or multiple phosphoserine, tyrosine, or threonine residues Isotope-Labeled Peptides Dedicated for quantitative mass spectrometry and NMR
{/* R&D to GMP Section */}
Development Lifecycle

R&D to GMP Manufacturing

Ensure consistent quality and compliance throughout your peptide drug development lifecycle. We offer both R&D and GMP grade peptide manufacturing services.

Consistent Quality
Same high standards from research to production
Full Compliance
GMP-certified facilities and documentation
Right Timing
Scalable production matching your timeline
Research Grade For discovery and early development
  • Flexible quantities (1 mg - 100g)
  • Multiple purity grades
  • Fast turnaround (3-5 weeks)
GMP Grade For clinical and commercial applications
  • Up to 98% purity
  • Complete documentation
  • Regulatory compliance
{/* Additional Services Section */}
Complete Solutions

Additional Services

Peptide Library Synthesis Custom peptide libraries for screening including overlapping peptides, alanine scanning, and positional scanning Peptide Conjugation Professional conjugation to KLH, BSA, or OVA via maleimide or succinimidyl ester for antibody development Peptide-Oligo Conjugates Produce up to 20 mg POCs in our specialized facilities for advanced applications
{/* Documentation Section */}

Documentation

  • HPLC & Mass Spec chromatograms
  • Technical data sheet (TDS)
  • Certificate of Analysis (CoA)

Format & Delivery

  • Lyophilized powder (standard)
  • Peptide in solution available
  • Ambient temperature shipping

Lead Times

  • Standard: 3-5 weeks
  • Modified peptides may require longer
  • Rush services available on request
{/* CTA Section */}

Your Trusted Peptide Synthesis Partner

Benefit from over 30 years of experience in custom peptide synthesis. Let's start your peptide production today.

{/* Footer */}
PeptideLab

Expert custom peptide synthesis for research and pharmaceutical applications.

Services

  • Custom Synthesis
  • Modifications
  • GMP Manufacturing
  • Peptide Libraries

Resources

  • Technical Guides
  • Quality Standards
  • Case Studies
  • FAQs

Company

  • About Us
  • Contact
  • Certifications
  • Privacy Policy

© 2026 PeptideLab. All rights reserved. Custom peptide synthesis services.

) }

messages.content:
Create a landing page for a similar service
https://www.anaspec.com/en/custom-peptides


Context from competitor pages:
https://www.anaspec.com/en/custom-peptides
Research Grade

# Custom Peptide Synthesis

Optimize your peptides thanks to AnaSpec's **30 years** of expertise in liquid and   
solid phase synthesis. Our peptide synthesis ranges from simple **unmodified**  
 to highly **modified** and hydrophobic peptides.

[Request a quote](/en/custompeptides/custompeptide/chooseyourgrade "Request a quote")

## Custom Peptides Specifications

|  |
| --- |
| **General** |
| **Length** | * Up to 60 amino acids |
| **Purity** | * 95 %, 90 %, 85 %, 70 % (98 % available for GMP grade) |
| **Quantity** | * 1 mg to hundreds of grams |
| **Counter - Ion** | * • TFA (default) * • Acetate, chloride or ammonium salt exchange \* |
| **QC Testing** |
| **Identity** | * Mass Spec Analysis |
| **% Purity** | * HPLC |
| **Additional testing \*** | * • Peptide content determination (CHN analysis or quant-peptide service) * • Solubility testing * • Peptide sequence confirmation * • Counterion content * • Metal content * • Endotoxin * • Bioburden |

\* Option on request for additional fee

[Request a quote](/en/custompeptides/custompeptide/chooseyourgrade "Quote")

# Peptide Modification Experts

We have the know-how to solve your peptide modification needs by incorporating **single** or **multiple** modifications at the  
 sequence N-terminus, C-terminus, and/or internally. We also manufacture simple unmodified and hydrophobic peptides.

[View modification table](/assets/c6570276-8634-42e2-a694-13260adededb/GUIDE-EN-Custom-Peptides-internal-modifications-designators-anaspec.pdf)

### Fluorescent Dye Labeled Peptides

We manufacture custom peptides with a broad range of premium fluorescent dyes that span the whole visible and near infrared spectrum.

[Learn more](/en/fluorescent-dye-labeled-peptides)

### FRET Peptides

We offer a full-range of dye-quencher FRET pairs to label your custom peptides

  

[Learn more](/en/fret-peptides)

### TR-FRET Peptides

We perform custom synthesis of labeled peptides with lanthanide metals as donor molecule.

  

[Learn more](/en/tr-fret)

### Stapled Peptides

  

We offer an adaptable platform for the custom synthesis of stapled peptides catering to a variety of biological applications.

[Learn more](/en/stapled-peptides)

### Lactam Ring Peptides

We offer a versatile platform for the synthesis of lactam ring cyclic peptides.

  

[Learn more](/en/cyclic-peptides)

### Disulfide-Bridged Peptides

We produce disulfide bridged peptides, utilizes stepwise protection or natural folding strategies.

[Learn more](/en/disulfide-bridged-peptides)

### Glycosylated and Glycated Peptides

Sugar moieties can be incorporated into your custom peptide(s), at single or multiple locations.

[Learn more](/en/glycosylated-peptides)

### Lipopeptides

  

We have developed novel methods for the synthesis and purification of hydrophobic peptide modifications.

  

[Learn more](/en/lipopeptide-modifications)

### Phosphorylated Peptides

Our chemists can incorporate single, or multiple combinations of phosphoserine, phosphotyrosine, or phosphothreonine residues into your custom peptide.

[Learn more](/en/phosphorylated-peptides)

### Heavy Isotope-labeled Peptides

Our ClearPoint™ Peptides are dedicated for use in Quantitative Mass Spectrometry and NMR analyses

[Learn more](/en/heavy-isotope-labeled-peptides)

### Peptide-Oligo Conjugates

We produce **up to 20 mg** POCs in our facilities located in Belgium.

  

[Learn more](/en/peptide-oligonucleotide-conjugates)

### Optimize Your Peptides Now

Check our Internal Modifications and related designators.

[View modification table](/assets/c6570276-8634-42e2-a694-13260adededb/GUIDE-EN-Custom-Peptides-internal-modifications-designators-anaspec.pdf)

## R&D to GMP

To ensure **consistent quality** and **compliance throughout** your peptide drug **development lifecycle**, we offer both **R&D** and **GMP grade** peptide manufacturing services. With our **fully customizable** peptide options, you will get the **right quantity**, and **quality**, at the **right time**.

[Learn more](/en/gmp-peptides)

## Peptide Library Synthesis

We offer custom **peptide library synthesis** for your screening needs, including overlapping peptide libraries, alanine scanning and positional scanning libraries.

[Learn more](/en/peptide-libraries)

## Peptide Conjugation Services

Need your custom **peptide conjugated** to **KLH**, **BSA**, or **OVA**? We can perform the conjugation for you via maleimide or succinimidyl ester reactive groups, for use in antibody and vaccine development.

[Learn more](/en/custom-conjugation-labeling-service)

### Documentation & Delivery

#### 

#### Documentation

* HPLC & Mass Spec chromatograms
* Technical data sheet (TDS)

#### Format

* Lyophilized powder, peptide in solution on request.
* For special format, please inquire about our Dispensing options.

#### Shipping

* Ambient temperature

#### Lead Times

* 3 – 5 weeks
* Highly modified peptides may require longer production times.

## 

## Your Peptide Synthesis Company

## Other AnaSpec's Services

### Let’s start your peptide production

Benefit from over 30 years of experience

[Customize your peptides](/en/custompeptides/custompeptide/chooseyourgrade)

https://www.biosyn.com/peptide-synthesis.aspx

Optimize your peptides thanks to AnaSpec's
solid phase synthesis. Our peptide synthesis ranges from simple
* • TFA (default) * • Acetate, chloride or ammonium salt exchange *
* • Peptide content determination (CHN analysis or quant-peptide service) * • Solubility testing * • Peptide sequence confirmation * • Counterion content * • Metal content * • Endotoxin * • Bioburden
* Option on request for additional fee
We have the know-how to solve your peptide modification needs by incorporating
sequence N-terminus, C-terminus, and/or internally. We also manufacture simple unmodified and hydrophobic peptides.
We manufacture custom peptides with a broad range of premium fluorescent dyes that span the whole visible and near infrared spectrum.
We offer a full-range of dye-quencher FRET pairs to label your custom peptides
We perform custom synthesis of labeled peptides with lanthanide metals as donor molecule.
We offer an adaptable platform for the custom synthesis of stapled peptides catering to a variety of biological applications.
We offer a versatile platform for the synthesis of lactam ring cyclic peptides.
We produce disulfide bridged peptides, utilizes stepwise protection or natural folding strategies.
Sugar moieties can be incorporated into your custom peptide(s), at single or multiple locations.
We have developed novel methods for the synthesis and purification of hydrophobic peptide modifications.
Our chemists can incorporate single, or multiple combinations of phosphoserine, phosphotyrosine, or phosphothreonine residues into your custom peptide.
Our ClearPoint™ Peptides are dedicated for use in Quantitative Mass Spectrometry and NMR analyses

messages.content:
I'll help you create a professional landing page for a custom peptide synthesis service. Let me start by generating a design brief to ensure we create something visually compelling, and also understand the codebase structure.Now I'll read the necessary files and create the landing page following the design brief. Let me check the current layout and globals.css files:Now I'll create the landing page. Based on the design inspiration that shows a sophisticated, professional approach with minimal colors and strong typography, I'll create a peptide synthesis landing page. Let me start by updating the metadata in layout.tsx, then updating the globals.css with a new color scheme, and finally creating the main landing page.Now I'll create the main landing page with all the sections based on the competitor content:I've created a professional, comprehensive landing page for a custom peptide synthesis service similar to the competitors you provided. The page features:

**Design highlights:**
- Clean, professional aesthetic with a minimal color palette (black/gray neutrals with a subtle blue accent)
- Strong typography hierarchy with the Geist font family
- Responsive mobile-first layout using Tailwind CSS

**Key sections included:**
1. **Sticky header** with navigation and CTA button
2. **Hero section** with compelling headline and statistics badge
3. **Stats bar** showcasing key metrics (30+ years, 60 amino acids, 98% purity, 3-5 week turnaround)
4. **Specifications section** detailing technical capabilities and QC testing
5. **Modifications section** featuring 9 specialty peptide types in a card grid
6. **R&D to GMP section** explaining the development lifecycle services
7. **Additional services** covering libraries, conjugation, and POCs
8. **Documentation section** with delivery details and lead times
9. **CTA section** with dark background for emphasis
10. **Footer** with organized links and company info

The page uses shadcn/ui components throughout (Button, Card, Badge) and follows best practices for accessibility, semantic HTML, and performance.

parts.thought:
The user wants me to create a landing page for a similar service to the competitor sites they've provided - which are custom peptide synthesis services. They've given me detailed context from two competitor pages (AnaSpec and BioSyn).

Looking at the requirements:
1. Generate a complete, professional landing page
2. Use modern HTML5 semantic markup
3. Style with Tailwind CSS classes
4. Include responsive design (mobile-first)
5. Make it visually appealing and professional
6. Include proper heading hierarchy
7. Add relevant sections based on competitor content
8. Output should be ready to use HTML

However, this is a v0 project where I should be creating a Next.js/React application, not just standalone HTML. The user mentions "inline Tailwind CSS classes" and "ready to use HTML" which suggests they might want a standalone HTML file, but given the v0 context and capabilities, I should create a proper Next.js landing page.

Actually, looking more carefully at the request - they're asking for a landing page for a peptide synthesis service. This is a complex scientific/biotech service. This is definitely a design-focused request that would benefit from creative direction since they haven't provided specific visual requirements beyond "professional" and "visually appealing."

I should:
1. Use GenerateDesignInspiration to get a design brief for a biotech/scientific service landing page
2. Search the codebase to understand structure
3. Build the landing page as a Next.js page

Let me proceed with this approach.

files.source:
import Link from 'next/link' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card' import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge' import { ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Beaker, FlaskConical, Sparkles, Shield, Clock, Award } from 'lucide-react' export default function Home() { return (
{/* Header */}
PeptideLab
Services Specifications Modifications About
{/* Hero Section */}
30+ Years of Excellence in Peptide Synthesis

Custom Peptide Synthesis Excellence

Optimize your research with expert peptide synthesis services. From simple unmodified to highly modified and hydrophobic peptides, we deliver precision at scale.

{/* Stats Section */}
30+
Years Experience
60
Max Amino Acids
98%
Purity Available
3-5
Week Turnaround
{/* Specifications Section */}
Technical Details

Custom Peptide Specifications

Industry-leading capabilities with rigorous quality control standards

General Specifications
Length
Up to 60 amino acids
Purity
70%, 85%, 90%, 95% (98% for GMP)
Quantity
1 mg to hundreds of grams
Counter-Ion
TFA (default), Acetate, Chloride, Ammonium
 Quality Control Testing
Mass Spec Analysis
Complete identity verification
HPLC Analysis
Purity determination
Additional Testing Available
CHN, Solubility, Endotoxin, Bioburden
{/* Modifications Section */}
Expertise

Peptide Modification Experts

We incorporate single or multiple modifications at N-terminus, C-terminus, or internally to meet your research needs

Fluorescent Dye Labeled Premium fluorescent dyes spanning visible and near-infrared spectrum FRET Peptides Full range of dye-quencher FRET pairs for your applications TR-FRET Peptides Lanthanide metal-labeled peptides for time-resolved applications Stapled Peptides Adaptable platform for versatile biological applications Cyclic Peptides Lactam ring and disulfide-bridged peptide synthesis Glycosylated Peptides Sugar moieties at single or multiple locations Lipopeptides Novel methods for hydrophobic peptide modifications Phosphorylated Peptides Single or multiple phosphoserine, tyrosine, or threonine residues Isotope-Labeled Peptides Dedicated for quantitative mass spectrometry and NMR
{/* R&D to GMP Section */}
Development Lifecycle

R&D to GMP Manufacturing

Ensure consistent quality and compliance throughout your peptide drug development lifecycle. We offer both R&D and GMP grade peptide manufacturing services.

Consistent Quality
Same high standards from research to production
Full Compliance
GMP-certified facilities and documentation
Right Timing
Scalable production matching your timeline
Research Grade For discovery and early development
  • Flexible quantities (1 mg - 100g)
  • Multiple purity grades
  • Fast turnaround (3-5 weeks)
GMP Grade For clinical and commercial applications
  • Up to 98% purity
  • Complete documentation
  • Regulatory compliance
{/* Additional Services Section */}
Complete Solutions

Additional Services

Peptide Library Synthesis Custom peptide libraries for screening including overlapping peptides, alanine scanning, and positional scanning Peptide Conjugation Professional conjugation to KLH, BSA, or OVA via maleimide or succinimidyl ester for antibody development Peptide-Oligo Conjugates Produce up to 20 mg POCs in our specialized facilities for advanced applications
{/* Documentation Section */}

Documentation

  • HPLC & Mass Spec chromatograms
  • Technical data sheet (TDS)
  • Certificate of Analysis (CoA)

Format & Delivery

  • Lyophilized powder (standard)
  • Peptide in solution available
  • Ambient temperature shipping

Lead Times

  • Standard: 3-5 weeks
  • Modified peptides may require longer
  • Rush services available on request
{/* CTA Section */}

Your Trusted Peptide Synthesis Partner

Benefit from over 30 years of experience in custom peptide synthesis. Let's start your peptide production today.

{/* Footer */}
PeptideLab

Expert custom peptide synthesis for research and pharmaceutical applications.

Services

  • Custom Synthesis
  • Modifications
  • GMP Manufacturing
  • Peptide Libraries

Resources

  • Technical Guides
  • Quality Standards
  • Case Studies
  • FAQs

Company

  • About Us
  • Contact
  • Certifications
  • Privacy Policy

© 2026 PeptideLab. All rights reserved. Custom peptide synthesis services.

) }
